zh.King's Lynn, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Brandon於1510年6月2日出生在英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳時，她的父親Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk26歲，母親Anne Browne22歲。她於1528年4月2日與Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle在英國藍卡爾梅林結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年在她的家鄉享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Brandon于1510年6月2日出生在英国諾福爾可金也斯 琳时，她的父亲Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk26岁，母亲Anne Browne22岁。她于1528年4月2日与Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle在英国藍卡爾梅林结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1542年在她的家乡享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brandon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Brandon, in Durham, Norfolk, Suffolk, Warwickshire, and elsewhere. Most are named with Old English brōm ‘broom, gorse’ + dūn ‘hill’. One in Lincolnshire, however, may be named after the Brant River, on which it stands; Ekwall derives the river name from Old English brant ‘steep’, presumably with reference to its steep banks. This surname was known in Ireland early enough to have a Gaelicized form de Breandún.
Irish (Kerry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Breandáin ‘son of Breandán’, a rare Kerry surname from the Latinized form of the name of the local saint, Brendan (Brendanus from Bréanainn).
French: from the Old French oblique case of the personal name Brando, of ancient Germanic origin (see Brand 1).

variants.name: Brand
meanings: English, Scottish, North German, Scandinavian, Dutch, and French (mainly Alsace and Lorraine): from the ancient Germanic personal name Brando, Old Norse Brandr, a short form of various compound names containing the element brand ‘sword’ (a derivative of brinnan ‘to flash’), of which the best known is Hildebrand . There is placename evidence for Brant(a) as an Old English personal name; however, the Middle English personal name Brand was probably introduced to England from Old Norse.
German: variant of   Brandt   1 and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
Swedish and Danish: ornamental name or nickname from brand ‘fire’.

variants.name: Brandom
meanings: English and Jewish (Sephardic): variant of   Brandon  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Brandon was born on 2 June 1510, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, her father, Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk, was 26 and her mother, Anne Browne, was 22. She married Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle on 2 April 1528, in Melling, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1542, in her hometown, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Brandon est née le 2 juin 1510, à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Browne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle le 2 avril 1528, à Melling, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1542, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Brandon am 2. Juni 1510 in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk 26 und ihre Mutter Anne Browne 22. Sie hat am 2. April 1528 in Melling, Lancashire, England Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1542 im Alter von 32 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Brandon è nata il il 2 giugno 1510 nel King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Anne Browne, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle il 2 aprile 1528, nel Melling, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1542, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Brandonが1510年6月2日にイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンで生まれた時，父Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolkは26歳，母Anne Browneは22歳であった。1528年4月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアメリングでSir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1542年に故郷で32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Brandon(이)가 1510년 6월 2일 영국 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Browne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1528년 4월 2일 영국 랭카실르 멜링에서 Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 그녀의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Brandon nasceu em 2 de junho de 1510, em King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Browne, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle em 2 de abril de 1528, em Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1542, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Brandon родилась 2 июня 1510 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Charles Brandon 1st Duke of Suffolk было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Browne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle 2 апреля 1528 г. в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1542 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 32 лет.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle el 2 de abril de 1528, en Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas.
